home.headline: Bring your team, tasks, and progress into one shared workspace

auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email to continue the password reset flow.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: This screen is ready to be wired to the reset token and API next.
auth.resendVerificationSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a new account verification link.
auth.verifyEmailSubtitle: WorkSphere is checking your verification link.
auth.registerSuccessWithEmail: A verification email has been sent to {email}. Please check your inbox.
auth.registerSuccessWithoutEmail: Registration succeeded, but the verification email could not be sent yet. Please try again.
auth.verifySuccessMessage: Email verified successfully. You can now log in.
auth.verifyFailedMessage: We couldn't verify your email. Please try again.
auth.verifyExpiredToken: The verification link is expired or invalid. Please request a new one.
auth.verifySystemError: A system error occurred. Please try again.

notFound.title: Oops! Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for doesn't exist. Click the button below to return to the homepage.

onboarding.profileSubtitle: Help your team members recognize you.
onboarding.workspaceSubtitle: Where your team will collaborate and share work.
onboarding.successSubtitle: Your profile and workspace have been set up successfully.
